questions.prompt: According to the PSI Oregon CCB bulletin, how many scored exam items are allocated to Oregon Lien Law?
questions.explanation: The PSI content outline lists Oregon Lien Law as a distinct domain with 5 scored items, making it a smaller but still testable section.

questions.prompt: After filing a claim of construction lien, what additional step does ORS 87.039 require?
choices: Record a second claim within 10 days
Mail notice of filing with a copy of the claim to owner and mortgagee within 20 days
File a CCB complaint before suit
questions.explanation: ORS 87.039 requires post-filing notice: the claimant must mail notice of filing and include a copy of the claim to the owner and mortgagee within 20 days.

questions.prompt: Which statement best reflects Oregon law on licensure and lien perfection?
choices: Licensure only matters for bid eligibility, not lien rights
A contractor can perfect a lien without a license if work quality is proven
ORS 701.131 generally conditions lien perfection and certain remedies on proper licensure, subject to exceptions
Licensure affects only residential liens and never commercial liens
questions.explanation: ORS 701.131 links lien perfection and other compensation remedies to required licensure status, while also including statutory exceptions that must be analyzed in context.
